title: Optimized++.
description: A Optimized Modpack helped to improve performance greatly (includes shaders).
body: This modpack helps improve performanc in Minecraft getting up to 300+ FPS! This modpack also has a few YouTuber-Friendly Mods such as: Replay Mod (In Newer Versions), Motion Capture, World Edit, and Axiom! This Modpack also includes shaders and other utilties mods!
